# unitree-mcp — Full Context

## Server
- Name: unitree-mcp
- 14 tools: sim_status, load_model, start_sim, stop_sim, get_state, apply_control, list_models, list_jobs, export_frame, agentic_sim_workflow, natural_language_control, analyze_sim_state, analyze_sim_logs, discover_model

## Web Dashboard
- Backend: uv -> uvicorn web_sota.backend.server:app —port 11052
- Frontend: npx vite --port 11053 --host
- API proxy: /api -> 127.0.0.1:11052

## External Repos
- D:\Dev\repos\external\unitree_mujoco (MuJoCo models + Python sim)
- D:\Dev\repos\external\unitree_ros2 (ROS 2 Humble packages)

## Models
Unitree robot models in unitree_mujoco/unitree_robots/{robot}/scene.xml

## Commands
uv sync
uv run pytest tests/ -q
uv run python -m unitree_mcp
.\web_sota\start.ps1
